title: Transfection of Capsaspora owczarzaki using Calcium-Phosphate Precipitation
author: Helena Parra Acero
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.p4adqse

steps.title: Seed 10 7 cells in a...
steps.instruction: Seed 10 7 cells in a flask with 5mL of growth medium, let grow for 24h at 23ºC to have a conflluent culture.

steps.title: Take the cells from the confluent...
steps.instruction: Take the cells from the confluent culture, seed 2*10 6 cells per well in 600 μL of growth medium.

steps.title: Replace growth medium with 600 μL...
steps.instruction: Replace growth medium with 600 μL of transfection medium, incubate 30 min at 18ºC (room temperature).

steps.title: While incubating with transfection medium, prepare...
steps.instruction: While incubating with transfection medium, prepare DNA mix (300 μLper experiment): 1.271 pmol of plasmid in distilled water (add water to reach a total of 120 μL) 150 ul of 2X HBS (to obtain final concentration 1X HBS) 30ul of 1.25 M CaCl2 (add dropwise and while flickering the tube, to obtain a final concentration of 125mM, then invert twice to ensure mixing) Incubate 10 min at 37ºC.

steps.title: Remove medium and add 300 μL...
steps.instruction: Remove medium and add 300 μL of DNA mix dropwise in the center of the wells, incubate 30min at 18ºC (room temperature).

steps.title: Add 500 μL of transfection medium,...
steps.instruction: Add 500 μL of transfection medium, incubate at least 4h at 23ºC.

steps.title: Remove medium and perform an osmotic...
steps.instruction: Remove medium and perform an osmotic shock with 110 μL of 10% glycerol shock for 1 min.

steps.title: Remove glycerol and add 600 μL of growth medium
steps.instruction: Remove glycerol and add 600 μL of growth medium. Put cells back at 23ºC until screening.

steps.title: If the transfected plasmid contains a...
steps.instruction: If the transfected plasmid contains a fluorescent marker, positive cells can be screened using a fluorescent microscope or by flow cytometry. Screening can be done 18h post transfection.
